---
title: "AI for Research"
subtitle: "LLM for Reporting"
author: "Prof. Ashraf Fawzy Nabhan"
date: 12 May 2025
format: 
  beamer:
    theme: CambridgeUS
---

# Can machines think?

## **One fact and one question**

**The Fact**

::: nonincremental
-   ***One must have natural intelligence to use an artificial intelligence***
:::

\vspace{.5cm}

**The question**

::: nonincremental
-   ***Can machines think?*** - Alan Turing 1950

    -   Summer workshop, ***The AI project*** - J McCarthy 1956
:::

# AI by hierarchy

## Hierarchy

-   **AI** \vspace{.5cm}

-   **ML** \vspace{.5cm}

-   **DL** \vspace{.5cm}

-   **GenAI**

## GPT is

::: nonincremental
-   a type of LLM.

-   an ANN that is used in NLP by machines.

-   is based on the transformer deep learning architecture, pre-trained on large data sets of unlabeled text, and able to generate novel human-like content
:::

# GenAI for Reporting

## Context

-   Have you really designed & conducted a rigorous research?

## ICMJE

-   **What is ICMJE?**

-   **Have you read ICMJE recommendations?**

-   **Have you fully implemented the recommendations?**

## Do

::: nonincremental
-   Authors should describe how they used AI

    -   If LLM was used for writing assistance, describe this in

        -   the cover letter.
        -   the acknowledgment section.
:::

## Do NOT

::: nonincremental
-   Authors should NOT list AI as a co-author, nor cite AI as an author.

    -   GenAI does not satisfy authorship criteria.

        -   Why? - Discussion point.
:::

## Classification for a well-informed decision

::: nonincremental
-   LLMs are divided into two parts

    -   knowledge base.

    -   language base.

-   Please use the language base only.

-   When people try to engage with the knowledge base, the models can hallucinate. 
:::

## Possible use

::: nonincremental
-   Copy editing

-   Paraphrasing

-   Pre-submission check e.g.

    -   [Penelope](https://www.penelope.ai)

    -   Paperpal preflight
:::

## Other uses

::: nonincremental
-   Provides fresh perspective on a research topic

-   Writes conference abstracts

-   Provides initial draft of scientific paper

-   Suggests journals based on criteria provided
:::

## Limitations

::: nonincremental
-   Artificial hallucination

-   Risk of bias

-   Lack of originality

-   Confidentiality
:::

## Hallucination

::: nonincremental
-   GenAI can “make up” information due to a process called “hallucination” —

    -   When it doesn’t understand how two pieces of information relate.

    -   It fills in the gap by generating information to make the two ends meet.

    -   This leads to the generation of false and misleading pseudo-facts.
:::

## Rain Man

![](images/rainman.jpg){fig-align="center" width="514"}

## A Hands-on Case Study

::: nonincremental
-   Matcha for better health

    -   Hallucination

    -   Bias
:::

## Take-home Message

::: nonincremental
-   Microwave is not a Chef but a tool to aid the Chef.

-   LLM is not a writer but a tool to aid the writer.
:::

## *Thank you, AFN*

![](images/QA.jpg)
